component.name: Protondrive-for-Linux
component.summary: Command-line helper for Proton Drive workflows on Linux

description.p: Protondrive-for-Linux is an unofficial command-line wrapper that integrates Proton Drive workflows with Proton's official proton-drive CLI and rclone. It supports browsing, uploads, downloads, session bridging, rclone-backed mounts, and persistent Linux mount helpers.
This Flatpak packages only the GPLv3 wrapper. Proton's official proton-drive CLI and rclone remain external tools and are not redistributed by this package.
Added rclone configuration support for Proton two-password accounts through mailbox password flags, encrypted vault storage, and refresh.
Added a bootstrap command that downloads proton-drive and rclone into a managed user directory with checksum verification and automatic discovery.
Added Flatpak packaging metadata, vendored Go dependencies for offline Flatpak builds, and host-tool forwarding for proton-drive and rclone inside the Flatpak sandbox.
Modernized the wrapper around Proton's official Drive CLI, added browserless session bridging, macOS WebDAV mounts, and persistent Linux systemd user mounts.
